title: Array Index Out of Bounds Bug Fix: Duplicate of Max Sum Subarray

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers `nums`, return the maximum contiguous subarray sum. Note that the subarray can be a single element. If the array is empty, return 0.
statement.notes: The maximum contiguous subarray sum can be negative or zero.

examples.explanation: The maximum contiguous subarray sum is 10 (4 + 3 + 2 + -2).
